english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
An Naba – The Tidings

What is it that they are questioning each other about?!
An Naba – The Tidings

[Is it] about the Great Tiding,
An Naba – The Tidings

the one about which they differ?
An Naba – The Tidings

No indeed! Soon they will know!
An Naba – The Tidings

No indeed! Soon they will know for once again!
An Naba – The Tidings

Did We not make the earth a resting place?
An Naba – The Tidings

and the mountains stakes?
An Naba – The Tidings

and create you in pairs?
An Naba – The Tidings

and make your sleep for rest?
An Naba – The Tidings

and make the night a covering?
An Naba – The Tidings

and make the day for livelihood?
An Naba – The Tidings

and build above you the seven mighty heavens?
An Naba – The Tidings

and make [the sun for] a radiant lamp?
An Naba – The Tidings

and send down water pouring from the rain-clouds,
An Naba – The Tidings

that We may bring forth with it grains and plants,
An Naba – The Tidings

and luxuriant gardens?
An Naba – The Tidings

Indeed the Day of Judgement is the tryst,
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
english translation text:
the day the Trumpet will be blown, and you will come in groups,
An Naba – The Tidings

and the sky will be opened and become gates,
An Naba – The Tidings

and the mountains will be set moving and become a mirage.
An Naba – The Tidings

Indeed hell is in ambush,
An Naba – The Tidings

a resort for the rebels,
An Naba – The Tidings

to reside therein for ages,
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
english translation text:
tasting in it neither any coolness nor drink,
An Naba – The Tidings

except boiling water and pus,
An Naba – The Tidings

a fitting requital.
An Naba – The Tidings

Indeed they did not expect any reckoning,
An Naba – The Tidings

and they denied Our signs mendaciously,
An Naba – The Tidings

and We have figured everything in a Book.
An Naba – The Tidings

So [now] taste! We shall increase you in nothing but punishment!
An Naba – The Tidings

Indeed a triumph awaits the Godwary:
An Naba – The Tidings

gardens and vineyards,
An Naba – The Tidings

and buxom maidens of a like age,
An Naba – The Tidings

and brimming cups.
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّابًا
english translation text:
Therein they shall hear neither vain talk nor lies
An Naba – The Tidings

—a reward and a sufficing bounty from your Lord,
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: رَّبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الرَّحْمَٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
english translation text:
the All-beneficent, the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them. They will not be able to address Him
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الرُّوحُ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
english translation text:
on the day when the Spirit and the angels stand in an array: none shall speak except someone who is permitted by the All-beneficent and says what is rightful.
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: ذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمُ الْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ مَآبًا
english translation text:
That day is true for certain. So let anyone who wishes take resort with his Lord.
An Naba – The Tidings

arabic text: إِنَّا أَنذَرْنَاكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ الْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ الْكَافِرُ يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنتُ تُرَابًا
english translation text:
Indeed We have warned you of a punishment near at hand—the day when a person will observe what his hands have sent ahead and the faithless one will say, ‘I wish I were dust!’
An Naba – The Tidings
